sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif missing==['real_claude_response'] or 'real_claude_response' in missing and 'workflow_dispatch_results' not in missing and 'claude_runtime_state' not in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_real_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 retry real Claude response; dispatch and runtime proof already present or not missing in BEM-839','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response; do not accept blocker files'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 repair dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 repair Claude runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime state'
else:
    status='unknown_missing_set'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-839 missing set'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':status_in,'bem839_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Route After BEM-839 Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.json','governance/reports/bem840_route_after_bem839_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-839 and queued the first missing proof repair without stopping')
